notAvail.title: Workforce not available
notAvail.body: We couldn’t find this property. Open it from the Owner Home screen and try again.

errors.missingSlug: Missing property slug in the URL.
errors.openProperty: We couldn’t open this property. You might not have access yet or the property doesn’t exist.
errors.loadRoles: We couldn’t load roles yet. Check that the workforce_jobs table exists for this project.
errors.loadApplicants: We couldn’t load applicants yet. Check that the workforce_applications table exists.
errors.saveRole: We couldn’t save this role. Please try again or check Supabase logs.
errors.updateStage: We couldn’t update this applicant’s stage. Please try again.

header.title: Local workforce
header.desc: Create open roles for this property, see applicants in one place, and move them to shortlisted or hired in a single tap.
header.notEnabledPre: Workforce is not fully enabled yet in this project. The UI is safe to explore; saving requires the

filter.searchPlaceholder: Search by role, department, city, status…

roles.title: Roles for this property
roles.desc: Every role here is scoped to this hotel only. No cross-property confusion.
roles.emptyNoRoles: No roles yet. Create your first role to start hiring locally.
roles.emptyFiltered: No roles match your filters. Try clearing the filters or search text.

detailEmpty.title: Select a role on the left
detailEmpty.body: You’ll see role details here along with every applicant. From here, the owner or HR can shortlist or mark someone as hired with a single tap.
detailEmpty.noRoles: Start by creating your first role. You can later manage applicants and shortlist in one tap.

form.desc: Describe the role clearly. Applicants will see this in their guest app.
form.roleTitlePlaceholder: Front Office Associate, F&B Steward, Room Attendant…
form.notesPlaceholder: What kind of profile works best? Any hard constraints or must-have qualities?

detail.applicantsDesc: Shortlist or move someone to hired in one tap.
detail.noApplicants: No applicants yet. Once candidates apply from the guest app or your share link, they’ll show here automatically.

footerTip: Tip: In the next phase, workforce can plug directly into your “Invisible staff shortage” radar — so if rooms and tickets are suffering because of hiring gaps, you’ll see it here first.
